message:
test(golden): update robot introspect + schemas fixtures for response_schema refactor

The earlier "refactor(robot-schema): extract per-section
response-schema helpers" commit expanded the declared schemas with
fields that were already surfaced at runtime but missing from the
inline schema blocks (checkpoint, fingerprint, health.db,
empty_with_messages, etc.).

Regenerate the robot introspect golden and the schemas.txt doc
golden so the goldens match the now-corrected schema output. Content
is mechanically regenerated; no new behavior, just catching the
fixtures up to the schema declarations they were always meant to
reflect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,13 @@ schemas: (auto-generated from contract)
       - os: string
     - version: string
   health:
+    - db: object
+      - conversations: ?
+      - counts_skipped: boolean
+      - exists: boolean
+      - messages: ?
+      - open_error: ?
+      - opened: boolean
     - errors: array
     - explanation: ?
     - healthy: boolean
